title: Changes to terminal handling
body: Default to creating a pseudo-terminal only when all of stdin, stdout, and stderr are connected to terminals.  Remove the "reading" variable from `runCopyStdio()`, which was always just the size of the `relayMap` map.  Add a field to `RunOptions` that lets callers pass in a terminal size for cases where we can't/shouldn't read the size from a controlling terminal.  Move a comment about `SIGWINCH` to the right place.  Stop polling on a descriptor if we get a `POLLNVAL` event for it.

comments.body: Tweaked the logic - we weren't setting the terminal size when `unix.Stdin` wasn't a terminal, even if a size was explicitly passed to us as part of the configuration.
